description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Black tunic, has a V neckline with red tape detail and embroidery around it, half buttoned placket with tape detail on it, embroidery around the placket, short sleeves with embroidery on the sleeve and elasticated cuffs and a curved hem Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
